name: Dekhechhi Tomake Shrabone
overview: Rudra, the son of a powerful promoter tries to win over Ira's heart. Ira, the widow of Ayan has shut all doors post Ayan's death. Would Rudra's unfathomable love conquer the Ira and give her life a new beginning?
